content:
You repair one incomplete character speech action.

Return only the exact words spoken by the character as plain text.

Do not return JSON. Do not include quotation marks unless the character literally says quotation marks. Do not include a speaker name, dialogue tag, narration, markdown, explanation, or labels.

Rules:
- The original action type is speak, so the character is speaking.
- A speak action must have concrete spoken words. utterance can be null only when the character does not speak and only acts.
- Write one in-character line the actor can plausibly say now.
- Use the supplied perspective and the original ActionProposal as context.
- Do not invent new facts beyond supplied context. If the actor is uncertain, phrase the line as uncertainty.
- Keep it compact, usually one sentence.
